Bike Bridge

This browser has no Web Bluetooth. Use Chrome/Edge on desktop or Android — or Bluefy on iPhone/iPad (Safari can't do this).
Looks for a BLE device named like “SB20 Bridge”.

Correction & identity

Nearby (tap to use as source):
scanning…

Calibrate against a reference

Reads your source (DUT) + a reference meter at once, then fits a correction curve so the source reads like the reference. Ride a spread of powers.
Stateidle
Pairs0 / 30
Residual–
Coverage across the power range (spread these):

Workout & erg (drive a trainer)

Connects to an FTMS trainer as a third link and holds the workout's target power (erg). Pick a trainer, load a preset, press Start.
